channel.title: All Teams - Release Notes
channel.description: Combined release notes from all teams

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password for Android Beta
item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Meet now organizes your meeting notes, transcripts, and recordings in your Google Drive
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re making it easier for users to find meeting notes, transcripts and recordings in Google Drive with the following improvements:After a meeting, we’ll automatically upload these files to a new folder in the host’s My Drive called “Google Meet.”Within that “Google Meet” folder, these files will...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Gemini Alpha is now Gemini Beta
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re updating the name of the Gemini Alpha program to "Gemini Beta." This new name more accurately reflects both the scale and the quality of the features that enter this launch stage. Please note that this is solely a branding change. This update does not alter any customer configurations, data...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - July 17, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28120.2546 for Experimental (26H1)
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, Today we're releasing build 28120.2546 for the Experimental (26H1) channel. Release notes can be found over in the Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28120.2546 for Experimental (26H1) appeared first on Windows Insider Blog.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Redesigned Google Classroom homepage with tailored views based on user’s role
item.description:
Google Workspace

Soon, Google Classroom will introduce a redesigned homepage globally across all editions to help teachers, students, and administrators easily find relevant content, resources, and tools tailored to their specific roles. The updated interface transforms the homepage into a dynamic, centralized hub...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - A centralized hub for meeting resources on the new Google Meet homepage
item.description:
Google Workspace

Finding the right notes or attachments for a meeting shouldn't feel like a scavenger hunt. We’re introducing a revamped Google Meet homepage on the web to help you stay organized and prepared throughout your entire meeting workflow.The new homepage provides a centralized view of your meeting agenda...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: We want to make Gemini the most helpful AI assistant for everyone. With Gemini 3.6 Flash, you can now tackle your everyday tasks with greater c
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We want to make Gemini the most helpful AI assistant for everyone. With Gemini 3.6 Flash, you can now tackle your everyday tasks with greater confidence, without choosing between speed and quality.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: We’re introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, an upgraded version of our Flash model, to help you tackle everyday tasks. Try using it for quick tasks li
item.description:
Gemini

What: We’re introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, an upgraded version of our Flash model, to help you tackle everyday tasks. Try using it for quick tasks like analyzing several documents or multi-step projects like building a working prototype with the Canvas tool. We're excited to bring this model to all...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Slack CLI v4.5.0
item.description:
Slack

Version 4.5.0 of the developer tools for the Slack platform has landed!

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 20 July 2026
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, Today we are releasing new Windows 11 Insider Preview Builds across Beta, Experimental and Release Preview. See your channel release notes here: Beta: Announcing new builds for 20 July 2026 appeared first on Windows Insider Blog.

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Upload files directly into agent chat
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Optimize
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Import and create combo charts in Google Sheets
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Sheets now offers enhanced support for combo charts, providing a more seamless experience when creating multi-series visualizations. Users can create new “Combo” chart types, enabling complex dataset visualization with different scales and metrics without requiring manual re-plotting. These...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 27.0 beta 4 (26A5388g)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.6 RC (25G70)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Room Panel Release Notes V4
item.description:
Korbyt

## **What's New?** This update represents a significant step forward in the reliability, longevity, and user experience of the Korbyt Room Panel App, while preserving all the functionality you are familiar with from the previous version. **Rebuilt on a Modern, Supported Platform** The application...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New VDI plugin info response fields
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | We added `vdi_plugin_info_status` and `vdi_plugin_info_fb_code_reason` response fields.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Add new request field to Shared Spaces API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added the `groups` request field to the POST /v2/chat/spaces/{spaceId}/members API.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 3.7.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Improved annotation input and scrolling behavior, and fixed Web Worker message timing issues.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 5.7.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Added support for additional Android SDK localizations.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 5.7.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Added support for additional iOS SDK localizations; updated minimum supported iOS version to 15.0 or later.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Weekly Recap - July 17, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Credential Provider for Windows (GCPW) now supports FIDO2-compliant physical security keys as a second factor for authenticationGoogle Credential Provider for Windows (GCPW) has been updated to support FIDO2-compliant physical security keys as a second factor for authentication. This update...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New Google Meet 'Take notes for me' settings for admins and end users
item.description:
Google Workspace

To help users remember to capture notes for meetings when it’s most valuable, we’re updating the admin and end user settings that let them pre-configure AI note-taking for Google Meet.Admin settingsPreviously, admins could only enable or disable automatic note-taking for all meetings. Today, we’re...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Cast yourself in AI video clips using your personal avatar with Gemini Omni in Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

Users now have access to Gemini Omni directly within Google Vids. With Gemini Omni, you can create videos using your personal avatar to scale your presence without the studio time. Use a secure verification process to capture your likeness and then select it as a character in Omni generations...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Generate higher quality AI video clips and edit any video with Gemini Omni in Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

Users now have access to Gemini Omni directly within Google Vids. Omni provides higher quality video generation with significant improvements over previous models. Additionally, Omni’s world understanding unlocks simple video edits so you can ask Omni to tweak the video you have to get the video...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanded language support for Gemini in Google Docs
item.description:
Google Workspace

Earlier this year, we introduced new Gemini in Google Docs capabilities that help you move from a blank page to a finished document faster than ever.We are now expanding support for these features to 11 more languages, including Mandarin, Dutch, Malay, Hebrew, Polish, Turkish, Czech, Indonesian,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Easily control the emotions and pacing of AI avatars and AI voiceovers in Google Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

Users can now easily steer voiceover and avatar speaking in Google Vids by typing content within brackets like “[excitedly]”.When typing open brackets (“[“) Vids will offer a menu of steering tags to customize pacing, emotional delivery, and sound effects. These cues empower you to guide the...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New response fields for Quote APIs
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New response fields for Quote APIs.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Return assigned user names for phone numbers
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added the `assigned_to_name` response field to the Phone Numbers APIs to return the name of the user or entity assigned to each phone number.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New external_storage_url field session.recording_completed webhook
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New external_storage_url field in the Cloud Recording session.recording_completed webhook event.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 2.6.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Support user failover status change. Add a pre-connection (two-step join) flow to speed up the actual session join. Joining or leaving a subsession now triggers the onSubSessionStatusChanged and onSessionLeave callbacks in useSdkEventListener.ts. Increase the command channel...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Bolt for JS v5
item.description:
Slack

Version 5.0.0 of Bolt for JS is here! This release follows the Node Slack SDK's shift from axios to the native Fetch API, removes the deprecated Workflow Steps from Apps feature, and raises the minimum Node.js version to 20.

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Booking Release Notes V9.9
item.description:
Korbyt

# **What's New?** ## **New Booking Diary** The New Booking Diary is a redesigned calendar view. It presents all bookable resources across multiple floors, buildings, and locations in a single scrollable screen, with a fixed time header that stays visible as you scroll, faster booking actions that...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Multiple Node Slack SDK package updates
item.description:
Slack

Our collection of Node Slack SDK packages have received new major versions.

View release notes →

Claude
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The design_types field on Design responses and the design_type field on DesignPage are now out of preview and included in every response.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Desktop notifications now pull text from blocks first
item.description:
Slack

Slack desktop client notifications now pull text from blocks first, falling back to the top-level text field only if no text can be extracted from blocks. Mobile notifications continue to exclusively use message.text.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Add new request field to Contacts API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added `next_page_token' and `pronoun` request fields to the `GET /v2/contacts` API.

View release notes →

item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental. New builds this week Today we are releasing new Windows 11 Insider Preview Builds. As a reminder, all Insiders can find the rel The post Announcing new builds for July 6 2026 appeared first on Windows...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - June Release Update
item.description:
Kuali Build

improvements We've now released Versions and Document History for all Build users. This makes Revisions function detailed below, as well as...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Propose Revisions to Completed Documents
item.description:
Kuali Build

You now have another way to update existing documents. In addition to editing a document directly or creating a new version, you can now pro...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Brain²: Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, Community!This week's ClickUpdates is a full Brain² takeover. Brain² self-improves, routes to the best models, and actually completes your work. It creates websites, builds slides, and manages projects while co-working with your entire team. Use every model you're used to, on every device, for...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Agent context has landed
item.description:
Slack

Agent apps can now receive context about what a user is currently viewing when they send a message. When a user has a channel, DM, thread, canvas, or list open and messages your app, Slack will pass that context automatically.

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - June 26, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Claude - Manage model access for your organization

Claude
View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: We built this to help you automate your daily busywork, from managing local files to streamlining multi-step projects. With Gemini Spark, we ar
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We built this to help you automate your daily busywork, from managing local files to streamlining multi-step projects. With Gemini Spark, we are transforming Gemini from an AI assistant that answers your questions into one that actually works proactively on your behalf.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Gemini Spark, your personal AI agent, is coming to the Gemini app for macOS. It helps you navigate your digital life by working on tasks on yo
item.description:
Gemini

What: Gemini Spark, your personal AI agent, is coming to the Gemini app for macOS. It helps you navigate your digital life by working on tasks on your behalf. Operating autonomously and under your direction, it organizes folders, uses your local files to build documents, and handles complex...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - 👋 Ask ClickUp's Head of AI anything about Brain² (Reddit AMA)
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, everyone!Jay Hack, ClickUp's Head of AI, is hosting an AMA (Ask Me Anything) on Reddit all about Brain², the ground-up rebuild of ClickUp Brain.🗓️ When: Tuesday, July 7th, 9am–11am PT📍 Where: r/ClickUp on RedditBrain² isn't another chatbot. It's a context-aware AI coworker that understands...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - New preview APIs are available: Get design analytics, Get design analytics viewers, Get design analytics views over time, Get design analytics page vi
item.description:
Canva

New preview APIs are available: Get design analytics, Get design analytics viewers, Get design analytics views over time, Get design analytics page views, and Get design analytics links. These APIs let you retrieve engagement metrics for a design shared via Canva.

View release notes →

item.title: PaperCut - 26.0.2
item.description:
PaperCut

New Features SAML 2.0 Authentication This feature introduces SAML 2.0 for single-sign-on support (SSO), enabling PaperCut NG/MF to integrate with external Identity Providers (IdPs) such as Microsoft Entra ID, Okta, and Ping Federate. This allows System Administrators to provide a consistent login...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Introducing the Agent messaging experience
item.description:
Slack

Agents now support a new messaging experience, set by your app manifest:

View release notes →

item.description:
Claude
View release notes →

item.title: Claude - Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
item.description:
Claude
View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Version Types and Limit Editability
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now configure Version Types and Limit Editability to control how users interact with forms based on the type of version they're work...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 26 June 2026, retail launch of new WIP improvements
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental, and are excited to begin rolling out the new Windows Insider experience to retail Windows 11 builds this week! New Windows Insider Program changes The post Announcing new builds for 26 June 2026, retail...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field na
item.description:
Canva

You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field names and types for a design, and the Create design autofill job API now supports a create_from_design value for type that uses those fields to create...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Resubmit Withdrawn Documents
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now edit and resubmit withdrawn documents without starting over. Previously, withdrawing a document was a permanent action. If you n...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is currently a preview feature.

View release notes →

item.title: Claude - Enable Trusted Devices for Remote Control
item.description:
Claude
View release notes →

Claude
View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Scheduled Secondary Workflows
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now automate workflow actions based on dates, helping you send reminders, trigger integrations, and manage time-sensitive processes ...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Bridge the Linux Gap with NinjaOne 14.0: Seamlessly Discover, Deploy, and Support Every Endpoint
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 14.0 release expands on the platform’s unified experience, offering IT professionals unparalleled visibility and control across operating systems. These enhancements eliminate operational gaps with remote support, automated deployment, and data protection all in one interface. Explore...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - The best AI is your AI. Brain² is here.
item.description:
ClickUp

The best AI is Brain². Guaranteed.Brain² is your company AI that self-improves, routes to the best models, and actually completes your work - creating websites, building slides, and managing projects. It's multiplayer AI where human intelligence becomes your collective Brain.Your context. Already...

View release notes →

Claude

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 19 June 2026, version 26H2 for Experimental
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental, including Windows 11, version 26H2 for Experimental. Windows 11, version 26H2 Windows 11, version 26H2 represents our yearly second half The post Announcing new builds for 19 June 2026, version 26H2 for...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value is create_from_brand_template, which is the existing functionality for creating new designs from a brand template. For backwards compatibility,...

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - Update on Pulse
item.description:
ChatGPT

Pulse is being sunset as proactive updates move into scheduled tasks. Pro users will continue to have access for 14 days from today. To keep receiving daily updates, you can ask ChatGPT to schedule a daily briefing based on your interests and past chats.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - Availability and limits
item.description:
ChatGPT

Rolling out to Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise users.Active task limits vary by tier. Tasks cannot run more than once per hour, and unattended tasks may automatically pause after a period of inactivity.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - What’s changing
item.description:
ChatGPT

A new Scheduled page, discoverable in the sidebar, gives users one place to view active tasks, see when they’ll run next, and pause, resume, edit, or delete them.All tasks are faster and more reliable.Users can schedule work for specific times or broader windows, such as morning, afternoon, or...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Booking Release Notes V9.8.2
item.description:
Korbyt

# **Release Fixes and Changes** | | | | | | | | | |

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 12 June 2026
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have a number of releases today with new builds across Beta, Experimental and Release Preview. Release notes for inbox Windows 11 apps Windows 11 inbox apps are now getting their own release notes sectio The post Announcing new builds for 12 June 2026 appeared first on...

View release notes →

Claude

item.title: ChatGPT - Availability
item.description:
ChatGPT

These model picker updates are rolling out to Plus and Pro users on web, iOS, and Android globally today.
